acceptance_criteria.statement: tsc --noEmit 全綠（涵蓋 P1+P2+P3+P4+P6 全部 .ts）
Vitest 75 tests 全綠；Phase 6 新增 ≥9 tests；累積 ≥66
src/templates/ci-workflow.tpl.yml 存在；npm run build:dist 後 dist/templates/ci-workflow.tpl.yml 亦存在
runBootstrap 對乾淨 tmpdir 產出 .github/workflows/agent-core-gate.yml；YAML 內含 name: agent-core-gate / on.push.branches main+feature/* / on.pull_request / agent-core check 指令
agent-core init --spec <FeatureSpec.json> 將 suggested_specifications + risk_pain_points 100% 注入 TASK.md 為 marker-fenced 區塊；重跑為 idempotent
Phase 1 Linter 引擎未退化（scanned=22, findings=39, fail=33, warn=6）
黑箱端到端：使用編譯後 dist/bin/agent-core.js 對全新 tmpdir 執行 init --spec <FeatureSpec.json> + check 兩步驟皆 exit 0；TASK.md 中含 marker-fenced AC 區塊（<!-- agent-core:feature-spec-ac:begin -->…<!-- :end -->）
acceptance_criteria.verification: Builder 已於 /tmp/agent-core-p6-smoke 實證（見 WORKLOG 2026-05-26T18:30 區塊的 <Execution_Evidence>）；Tester 須以全新 tmpdir 復現

phase6_design_summary.ci_gate: src/templates/ci-workflow.tpl.yml is the single source of truth for the cloud hard-block workflow. runBootstrap reads it via fileURLToPath(import.meta.url) with dual resolution (dist/templates with src/templates fallback) so dev (tsx) and prod (compiled) paths both work. scripts/copy-assets.mjs copies the template into dist on `npm run build:dist`. Output file: .github/workflows/agent-core-gate.yml (idempotent — never overwrites a downstream-customised workflow).
phase6_design_summary.feature_spec_bridge: src/compiler/specCompiler.ts now exports loadFeatureSpec(path) + compileFeatureSpecToAcceptanceCriteria(spec) + FEATURE_SPEC_AC_MARKERS. FeatureSpec items may be plain strings or {id, statement, severity}. Output is a marker-fenced Markdown block appended to TASK.md. Re-injection is idempotent — second pass detects the begin marker and skips. runBootstrap accepts BootstrapOptions.featureSpecPath; agent-core init accepts --spec <path> or --spec=<path>.
phase6_design_summary.spec_version_bump: 0.4.0 → 0.5.0 across package.json, agent-governance.json, bootstrap seed, and SPEC_ID (unified-agent-spec-core@phase6).
phase6_design_summary.test_growth: Phase 6 adds 18 tests (ciWorkflow:6 + specBridge:12), bringing cumulative from 57 → 75 (≥ 66 threshold).

known_limitations: [Phase 1-4 殘留] 詳見前期 known_limitations（dist/ ESM、Windows DEP0190 informational warning、runBootstrap 無 --force、CLI 無 --cwd）
[Phase 6 新增] 出廠 CI workflow 採 `npm install --no-save unified-agent-spec-core || true` 作為 best-effort 安裝路徑；monorepo / submodule 等替代供應方式需 downstream 自行客製，再次執行 runBootstrap 會略過用戶修改（idempotent）。
[Phase 6 新增] FeatureSpec AC 區塊一律附加於 TASK.md 末端而非插入既有 Phase 區塊內，作者可手動拖移位置；marker 內容不可移除，否則 idempotency 偵測會失效並導致重複注入。
[Phase 6 新增] loadCiWorkflowTemplate() 若 dist/templates 與 src/templates 雙路徑皆不存在則 throw（desired failure mode：template 不在 = 壞 build）；下游若僅取 dist/ 必須確保 `npm run build:dist` 完整跑過 copy-assets 步驟。
handover_protocol_note: Builder Phase 6 Session 已暫停。請開啟全新 Tester Session 進行驗收。依 acceptance_criteria 順序執行 verification_commands；5 條命令必須 exit=0、總測試 75。預期 dist/bin/agent-core.js + dist/templates/ci-workflow.tpl.yml 均已成功產出。AC-P6-08 之黑箱 E2E 必須於全新 tmpdir 復現（init --spec → check 皆 exit 0；TASK.md 含 marker-fenced AC 區塊）。
